items.name: Town Map
items.effect: Use to see the overworld map.

items.name: Tri-Pass
items.effect: Grants access to the first three Sevii Islands.

items.name: Tropic Mail
items.effect: Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.

items.name: Twisted Spoon
items.effect: Held: Psychic-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage.

items.name: Ultra Ball
items.effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Success rate is 2×.

items.name: Upgrade
items.effect: Traded on a Porygon: Holder evolves into Porygon2.

items.name: Vs. Seeker
items.effect: Allows rebattling of on-screen trainers. 100 steps to recharge.

items.name: Wailmer Pail
items.effect: Used to water berries.

items.name: Water Stone
items.effect: Evolves an Eevee into Vaporeon, a Lombre into Ludicolo, a Panpour into Simipour, a Poliwhirl into Poliwrath, a Shellder into Cloyster, or a Staryu into Starmie.

items.name: Watmel Berry
items.effect: Used for creating PokéBlocks and Poffins.

items.name: Wave Mail
items.effect: Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.

items.name: Wepear Berry
items.effect: Used for creating PokéBlocks and Poffins.

items.name: White Flute
items.effect: Doubles the wild Pokémon encounter rate.

items.name: White Herb
items.effect: Held: Resets all lowered stats to normal at end of turn. Consumed after use.

items.name: Wiki Berry
items.effect: Held: Consumed at 1/2 max HP to restore 1/8 max HP. Confuses Pokémon that dislike dry flavor.

items.name: Wood Mail
items.effect: Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.

items.name: X Accuracy
items.effect: Raises accuracy by one stage in battle.  Raises happiness.

items.name: X Attack
items.effect: Raises Attack by one stage in battle.  Raises happiness.

items.name: X Defense
items.effect: Raises Defense by one stage in battle.  Raises happiness.

items.name: X Sp. Atk
items.effect: Raises Special Attack by one stage in battle.  Raises happiness.

items.name: X Speed
items.effect: Raises Speed by one stage in battle.  Raises happiness.

items.name: Yellow Flute
items.effect: Cures confusion.

items.name: Yellow Scarf
items.effect: Raises the holder’s Toughness while in a contest.

items.name: Yellow Shard
items.effect: No effect. Can be traded for items or moves.

items.name: Zinc
items.effect: Raises Special Defense and happiness.
